title: Auth Marker v1
description: Canonical auth-marker for first authenticated action in flywheel-managed agents. Extends validation-receipt/v1 family. Sandbox-only ratification 2026-05-04T00:14Z by flywheel:1 RubyCreek (per Joshua delegation 'work with pane 1 of flywheel not me'). Production semantics require separate ratification.

service.description: Target service identifier (e.g. hubspot, stripe, agent-mail, infisical)

env.description: v1 is sandbox-only. Prod requires separate ratification.

auth_proof.description: Method-specific proof. Verification_command must consume this.

verification_command.description: Idempotent shell command. Exit 0 = marker valid. Must NOT mutate.

issuer.description: Actor identifier (orch session:pane or fleet-mail identity)

rollback_guard.description: Command to undo any mutation gated by this marker. Required for first-apply gating.

signature.description: Optional HMAC over canonical JSON form
